properties.SQL Query:
SELECT 
    c.*,

    -- FIX conflicts
    pm.nif AS pm_nif,
    pm.regime_fiscal AS pm_regime_fiscal,

    -- other columns from personne_morale
    pm.contribuable_id,
    pm.nom_legal,
    pm.nom_commercial,
    pm.type_personne_morale,
    pm.forme_juridique,
    pm.date_creation,
    pm.pays_constitution,
    pm.identifiant_unique_national,
    pm.num_tva,
    pm.identifiant_sectoriel,
    pm.num_rc,
    pm.scan_rc,
    pm.secteur_activite,
    pm.secteur_activite_principal,
    pm.code_activite_isic,
    pm.description_activite,
    pm.date_debut_activite,
    pm.nb_employes,
    pm.adresse_siege_rue,
    pm.adresse_siege_quartier,
    pm.adresse_siege_ville,
    pm.adresse_siege_region,
    pm.adresse_siege_pays,
    pm.justificatif_adresse_siege,
    pm.email_officiel,
    pm.tel_fixe_2,
    pm.site_web,
    pm.num_licence_sectorielle,
    pm.scan_licence_sectorielle,
    pm.implique_entreprises,
    pm.lien_entreprise_nom,
    pm.lien_entreprise_nif,
    pm.lien_entreprise_role,
    pm.participation_pct,
    pm.docs_justificatifs_lien,
    pm.detient_parts_autres_societes,
    pm.entreprises_liees_nom,
    pm.entreprises_liees_nif,
    pm.entreprises_liees_pct,
    pm.est_filiale_groupe,
    pm.societe_mere_nom,
    pm.societe_mere_nif,
    pm.organigramme_groupe,
    pm.rep_nom,
    pm.rep_fonction,
    pm.rep_tel,
    pm.rep_email,
    pm.rep_legal_nom,
    pm.rep_legal_fonction,
    pm.rep_legal_type_piece,
    pm.rep_legal_num_piece,
    pm.rep_legal_nationalite,
    pm.rep_legal_tel_mobile,
    pm.rep_legal_email,
    pm.rep_legal_adresse,
    pm.rep_legal_scan_piece,
    pm.ubo_nom,
    pm.ubo_nationalite,
    pm.ubo_date_naissance,
    pm.ubo_type_participation,
    pm.ubo_pourcentage,
    pm.ubo_scan_piece,
    pm.ubo_adresse,
    pm.lieux_exercice

FROM datamatch.contribuable c
JOIN datamatch.personne_morale pm
    ON pm.contribuable_id = c.id;

SELECT 
    c.*,
    pp.*
FROM datamatch.contribuable c
JOIN datamatch.personne_physique pp
    ON pp.contribuable_id = c.id
